sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_alpha (id INT, declination DOUBLE, radius DOUBLE, computed_alpha DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO test_alpha (id, declination, radius) VALUES (1, 5.0, 1.2);
UPDATE test_alpha SET computed_alpha = sys.alpha(declination, radius) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, declination, radius, computed_alpha FROM test_alpha WHERE computed_alpha IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO test_alpha (id, declination, radius) VALUES (2, sys.alpha(10.0, 2.0), 2.0);
